datasets.display_name: EFSA Comprehensive European Food Consumption Database
notes: Governed metadata entry for the EFSA food-consumption infrastructure used to support EU dietary exposure workflows.
This registry entry does not redistribute the underlying proprietary or access-controlled survey extracts.

datasets.display_name: EFSA DietEx dietary exposure support metadata
notes: Governed metadata entry for DietEx as exposure-support tooling around EFSA food-consumption infrastructure.
DietEx is represented separately from PRIMo and is not treated as a submission engine in Dietary MCP.

datasets.display_name: EFSA EU Menu standardised survey programme metadata
notes: Governed programme-level metadata for EFSA's EU Menu effort to standardise food consumption data collection across Member States.
This entry complements the Comprehensive Database registry record and does not redistribute raw survey files.
Governed metadata for chronic general-population cluster diets used in JMPR and related global screening contexts.
Not suitable for children-specific or shorter-than-lifetime exposure assessment.
EFSA food-consumption infrastructure and DietEx metadata are exposed as the primary EU pesticide dataset layer.
